# MixSwitchEpi

This repository contains tools and models for epidemics with
heterogeneous contact (activity) classes, with individuals able to
switch between them through time.

It requires `odin2` to run. \### Installation

# Package index

## Core Simulation & Framework

Main epidemic models and high-level simulation entry points.

- [`run_system_wparms()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/run_system_wparms.md)
  : Run the system and produce neat output
- [`seirs_act()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/seirs_act.md)
  : SEIRS Activity Model Generator
- [`main_f()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/main_f.md)
  : Demo function for plotting
- [`run_combination()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/run_combination.md)
  : Run and record a 2D parameter scan
- [`scan_mixswitch_framework()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/scan_mixswitch_framework.md)
  : Scan 2D parameter space (epsilon × switch_rate.
- [`scalar_reference()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/scalar_reference.md)
  : Homogeneous SEIR trajectory (mass-action)
- [`haslemere_empirical()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/haslemere_empirical.md)
  : Empirical Haslemere scan
- [`haslemere_grid()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/haslemere_grid.md)
  : Haslemere grid scan
- [`haslemere_mix_parms()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/haslemere_mix_parms.md)
  : Forces proportionate (random) mixing in Haslemere activity classes
  Hence epsilon = 0
- [`seir_model()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/seir_model.md)
  : Homogeneous SEIR model
- [`metaroutine()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/metaroutine.md)
  : Run a standard set of routines
- [`plot_combin()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/plot_combin.md)
  : Plot combined results

## Parameter Management

Functions for creating, calibrating, and managing model parameters.

- [`make_parms()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/make_parms.md)
  : Make a default parameterisaiton
- [`calibrate_parms()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/calibrate_parms.md)
  : Changes the β value until the target R0 is met
- [`basic_scalar_parms()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/basic_scalar_parms.md)
  : Get the scalar epi parameters for given pathogen
- [`make_homogeneous_parms()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/make_homogeneous_parms.md)
  : Make homogeneous parameters
- [`make_initial_conditions()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/make_initial_conditions.md)
  : Make the initial conditions
- [`make_initial_guess()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/make_initial_guess.md)
  : Make an initial guess of an 'effective' mixing matrix
- [`make_initial_specific()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/make_initial_specific.md)
  : Specific activity class infected first.
- [`make_initial_uniform()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/make_initial_uniform.md)
  : Initial conditions where each compartment is inoculated
  simultaenously with an equal fraction of exposed individuals (or,
  rather, stuff...)
- [`activity_empirical()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/activity_empirical.md)
  : Retrieve fitted activity scores for a given setting
- [`activity_linear()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/activity_linear.md)
  : Generate the activity-class scaler for each activity class Linear
  activity scores
- [`activity_null()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/activity_null.md)
  : Generate a null activity vector
- [`find_gamma_expectations()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/find_gamma_expectations.md)
  : Find expected values (means) within gamma distribution bins
- [`make_generator()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/make_generator.md)
  : Make a generator matrix

## Mixing & Contact Models

Generative models for contact/mixing matrices within and between
activity classes.

- [`garnett_mixing()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/garnett_mixing.md)
  : parameterically generate mixing matrix for the desired number
  ofactivity classes
- [`exponential_mixing()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/exponential_mixing.md)
  : Parameterically generate exponential mixing model
- [`polynomial_mixing()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/polynomial_mixing.md)
  : Parametrically generate mixing matrix for the desired
- [`make_contact_matrix()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/make_contact_matrix.md)
  : Construct the contact matrix
- [`generate_mixingmat()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/generate_mixingmat.md)
  : Generate a mixing/contact matrix with selectable model
- [`rho_matrix()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/rho_matrix.md)
  : Generates the rho matrix from parameters

## Switching Dynamics

Rate matrices defining movement between activity classes.

- [`simple_switching()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/simple_switching.md)
  : Make the simplest possible switching matrix.
- [`adjacent_switching()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/adjacent_switching.md)
  : Switching matrix where you can only move between adjacent classes
- [`adjacent_switching_wrapped()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/adjacent_switching_wrapped.md)
  : Switching matrix where you can only move between adjacent classes
  but wraps lowest and highest activities.
- [`elaborated_switching()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/elaborated_switching.md)
  : Elaborated switching
- [`make_switch_matrix()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/make_switch_matrix.md)
  : Make the switching matrix according to supplied model

## Epidemic Metrics & Analytics

Functions to calculate R0, Rt, and characterise epidemic outcomes.

- [`compute_r0()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/compute_r0.md)
  : Computes the next-generation matrix and R0
- [`compute_rt()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/compute_rt.md)
  : Computes the Rt using the population state at a particular time t
- [`compute_rt_ts()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/compute_rt_ts.md)
  : Compute R0 and Rt time series from model output
- [`compute_all()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/compute_all.md)
  : Wrapper function to compute all metrics
- [`compute_hit()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/compute_hit.md)
  : Compute empirical herd immunity threshold (HIT)
- [`compute_homogeneous_metrics()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/compute_homogeneous_metrics.md)
  : Computes the outcome metrics for a homogeneous population
- [`compute_ngm()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/compute_ngm.md)
  : Constructs the next-generation matrix
- [`compute_r0_static()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/compute_r0_static.md)
  : Compute R0 from a static mixing matrix and scalar parameters
- [`compute_ttprev()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/compute_ttprev.md)
  : Compute time to threshold prevalence
- [`characterise_peaks()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/characterise_peaks.md)
  : Characterise epidemic peaks for total and by class
- [`characterise_end()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/characterise_end.md)
  : Compute epidemic duration and final size
- [`compute_spectral_gap()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/compute_spectral_gap.md)
  : spectral gap calculation
- [`spectral_radius()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/spectral_radius.md)
  : Convienience function to compute the spectral radius of a matrix
- [`t_matrix()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/t_matrix.md)
  : Generates the T matrix from parameters
- [`t_entry()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/t_entry.md)
  : Generates a single entry of the T matrix
- [`sigma_matrix()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/sigma_matrix.md)
  : Makes the sigma matrix
- [`check_fraction_exposed()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/check_fraction_exposed.md)
  : Sanitise the exposed fraction
- [`find_peaks()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/find_peaks.md)
  : Find epidemic peaks (for I or E + I)
- [`find_steadystate()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/find_steadystate.md)
  : Find the steady-state distribution of a continuous-time Markov chain
  given its transition rate matrix W.
- [`homogeneous_metrics()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/homogeneous_metrics.md)
  : Metrics for homogeneous SEIR epidemic

## Visualisation & Comparison

Plotting tools for trajectories, heatmaps, and model comparisons.

- [`plot_epidemic_annotated()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/plot_epidemic_annotated.md)
  : Plot epidemic course with annotated metrics
- [`plot_epidemic_faceted()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/plot_epidemic_faceted.md)
  : Plot all compartments (SEIR) separately
- [`plot_epidemic_with_rt()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/plot_epidemic_with_rt.md)
  : Combined plot of epidemic trajectory and Rt
- [`plot_haslemere_grid()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/plot_haslemere_grid.md)
  : Plot the grid of (e.g.,) Haslemere results
- [`plot_rt_timeseries()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/plot_rt_timeseries.md)
  : Plot Rt over time with R0 reference line
- [`plot_2d_heatmaps()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/plot_2d_heatmaps.md)
  : Plot 2D heatmaps of epidemic metrics
- [`plot_sweep_results_1d()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/plot_sweep_results_1d.md)
  : Plot 1D parameter sweeps
- [`curve_comparison()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/curve_comparison.md)
  : Compare SEIR curves across models, using the palette to colour the
  curves by model type. This is a more direct comparison of the epidemic
  trajectories than the bar_comparison of summary metrics, and can
  reveal differences in timing and shape of the epidemics that may not
  be captured by summary metrics alone. Facets by S, e, i ,r and plots
  the occupancy for each of those states for each model .
- [`bar_comparison()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/bar_comparison.md)
  : Bar comparison of outcome metrics across models
- [`compare_curves_main()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/compare_curves_main.md)
  : Main comparison: faceted SEIR curves (left) + grouped metric bars
  (right)
- [`homogeneous_curve()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/homogeneous_curve.md)
  : Plot homogeneous mass action model
- [`multi_outcome_comparison()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/multi_outcome_comparison.md)
  : Multi-outcome 2-D comparison heatmaps
- [`example_comp()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/example_comp.md)
  : Example comparison scan and plot
- [`save_heatmaps()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/save_heatmaps.md)
  : Save all heatmap plots
- [`make_metric_comparison()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/make_metric_comparison.md)
  : Metric comparison across models

## Structural Approximations

Mapping complex heterogeneous models to simpler parametric
approximations.

- [`approx_epsilon()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/approx_epsilon.md)
  : Apperoximate a switching system with a no-switch system using a
  single scalar epsilon parameter for assortativity/proportionate
  mixing.
- [`approx_both()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/approx_both.md)
  : Approximate a switching system with a no-switch system using both
  minimally constrained contact matrix and epsilon-constrained
  approximations.
- [`approx_minimally_constrained()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/approx_minimally_constrained.md)
  : Approximate a switching system with a minimally constrained contact
  matrix with no switching
- [`compare_approx()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/compare_approx.md)
  : Function to plot the approximated system against the original system
- [`approximation_error()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/approximation_error.md)
  : Characterise error in approximations across parameter space
- [`fit_noswitch()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/fit_noswitch.md)
  : Fit non-switching system
- [`score_difference()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/score_difference.md)
  : Score difference between model outputs

## Utilities & Data Handling

Helper functions for state manipulation, file export, and internal
formatting.

- [`neaten_state()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/neaten_state.md)
  : Neaten up the dust2 output into a data.table
- [`declass()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/declass.md)
  : Simplifies epidemic output
- [`kronecker_delta()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/kronecker_delta.md)
  : kronecker_delta
- [`get_info()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/get_info.md)
  : Convenience function to get population info from model output
- [`write_epidemic()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/write_epidemic.md)
  : Writes out the epidemic to a csv
- [`pivot_seir()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/pivot_seir.md)
  : Pivot SEIR epidemic df + prepare for plotting
- [`scale_results()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/scale_results.md)
  : Compute how synchronised epidemic peaks are Scale results by
  occupancy fraction for each activity class
- [`mat_from_vec()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/mat_from_vec.md)
  : Make a matrix suitable for use as a contact matrix from a supplied
  vector
- [`vec_from_mat()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/vec_from_mat.md)
  : Make a vector for input into optimisation fun.
- [`report_scan_results()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/report_scan_results.md)
  : Report the parameter scan results
- [`display_mix_switch()`](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/reference/display_mix_switch.md)
  : Pretty-print contact and switching matrices

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [MixSwitchEpi](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/articles/approximation.md):
- [Comparing Homogeneous and Heterogeneous
  Epidemics](https://vargasrichards.github.io/MixSwitchEpi/articles/comparison_barchart.md):
